title: World-class Trustworthy Floppas
body:
# Do you pray to the almighty Big Floppa every day? If so, this mod is for you!


bruberu's World-Class Trustworthy Floppas adds caracals to your world, which spawn most often in savannahs (although you'll still have to search a bit).
 

They can be tamed much like ocelots, and enjoy raw fish, raw chicken, and raw rabbit.


They also are formidable protectors of their owners! They:

- have double the health and attack damage of dogs
- regen over time without food (although feeding them still helps)
- can sprint to their targets
- are immune to friendly fire
- and act proactively (rather than sitting around until something actually gets hurt).
 

They're also just really cute :). Caracals can be bred once they're tamed, making even cuter baby floppas :)

 

The mod is also still undergoing development! In the future, the mod may have:

- chiseled stone and sandstone for praying to the Flop
- cybernetic enhancements for caracals
- GregTech Community Edition Unofficial compatibility

Before you ask, I'm not porting past 1.12.2; there are plenty of caracal mods already for that.

 

Thanks to Bloody Reaper#6888 on Discord for helping out with the model and the Russian translation!

 

And yes, the acronym is intentional.
